verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Father is searching For all who will worship In spirit and in truth; And He is discerning The thoughts and the yearnings Of ev’ry heart in this room. So, let us determine That right at the start We will worship the Father With all of our heart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With all of our heart, mind, and strength, We give You honor, glory and praise; Not from afar, or just with our lips But all that we are, We offer in worship With all of our heart, mind and strength Jesus, we come, to lift up Your name We give You glory, we give You praise, With all of our heart, and our mind, and our strength.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus we offer our lives on the altar, Cleanse our hearts and thoughts; That we may stand, holy, And we can come boldly Before the Throne of our God. For we have determined That right at the start We will worship You, Jesus With all of our heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: With all of our heart, mind, and strength, We give You honor, glory and praise; Not from afar, or just with our lips But all that we are, We offer in worship With all of our heart, mind and strength Jesus, we come, to lift up Your name We give You glory, we give You praise, With all of our heart, and our mind, and our strength.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We give You glory, we give You praise, With all of our heart, and our mind, and our strength.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: With all of our heart, (With all of our heart, mind, and strength) Lord unto You; (We give You glory, we give You praise) With all of our heart, We give You praise.
